Faria Usman posted: ✨ Alhamdulillah! 30 Days of 30 Projects Challenge Completed 🚀



I’m happy to share that I have successfully completed the 30Days-of-30Projects challenge ✨



This journey was amazing — from building small utilities to working with modern tech stacks, every project helped me learn something new and improved my development skills 🔥



If you are also working on this challenge, I highly recommend completing all 30 projects (or at least more than 15 ✅). You will gain great hands-on experience with the latest technologies and development practices.



Keep learning, keep building, and stay consistent 💡



#30DaysChallenge #WebDevelopment #Nextjs #CodingJourney #Alhamdulillah #DeveloperLife #developer #project

Adeel Ahmed Satti posted: A Grand & Warm Welcome to Mr. Karim Teli!



We are honored to welcome Mr. Karim Teli, Managing Director at Pakistan Dairy Products – IGLOO, to Zaitoon Ashraf IT Park.



His presence is truly inspiring for our students, entrepreneurs, and tech enthusiasts. As a dynamic leader in the corporate sector, his journey and insights will motivate the next generation to aim higher and think bigger.



📅 Wednesday, 25th February 2026

⏰ 02:00 PM

📍 Zaitoon Ashraf IT Park



Join us for an engaging session filled with valuable knowledge, leadership insights, and real-world experience.



Stay connected with us for more updates.

#WarmWelcome #KarimTeli #ZaitoonAshrafITPark #SaylaniMassITTraining #Leadership #Inspiration #CorporateLeadership #TechCommunity
